trivia: The stretched A350 is Airbus's biggest twin, aimed straight at the 777. It needs more muscle, so it carries the most powerful engine Rolls-Royce has ever built for Airbus and a six-wheel main gear.
Count the wheels: the -1000 rides on six-wheel bogies, the -900 on four. That is the fastest tell.
funFacts: Chosen for Qantas's planned nonstop Sydney to London flights.
Trent XWB-97 delivers 97,000 lbf of thrust per side.
